name: Rishabh Singh
title: Aspiring Software Development Engineer
tagline: Building scalable full-stack applications with strong backend architecture, caching, and system design.
bio: I am an aspiring Software Development Engineer currently pursuing B.Tech at NIT Calicut, with a strong focus on full-stack development, low-level design, and scalable system architecture. I have built and deployed multiple production-ready applications using the MERN stack, integrating Redis caching, load balancing strategies, and cloud services. My work includes designing systems with design patterns, implementing real-world features like anomaly detection, and optimizing performance through efficient backend engineering. I have solved 500+ algorithmic problems and actively strengthen my problem-solving and system design skills.
